heading: Inspections relating to food allergens
label: 374a Inspections relating to food allergens
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as a part of the Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act of 2004, and not as part of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act which comprises this chapter.

children.text: to ensure that the entities operating the facilities comply with practices to reduce or eliminate cross-contact of a food with residues of major food allergens that are not intentional ingredients of the food; and
to ensure that major food allergens are properly labeled on foods.
